titleStmt.title: SII 24.423: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 423. (A.R. No. 17 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, EAST AND NORTH WALLS.

summary.p: Registers an endowment of 40 poṉ of gold by Śrīraṅgarājaṉ Sōmayāji Tirukkalikaṉṟidāsaṉ, son of Kōyil-Piḷḷai Nālukavip-Perumāḷ Jīyar-Bṛihaspati Sarvayājiyār Śōlaimalaip-Perumāḷ Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷap-Perumāḷ of Kāśyapagōtra and Jaimini-sūtra, to provide from the interest therefrom, at the rate of 1/80th part of the principal in accordance with Yājñavalkya smṛiti ‘Aśītibhāgō-vṛiddhisyāt’ quoted in the record, daily offerings to god on specified occasions. Mentions the donor's disciple Nāgadēvar Kaṇakkappiḷḷai of Tirunāgappaṭṭaṇam and Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷa-Jīyar-maṭha alias Rāmānuja-maṭha, probably built by Tirumalai-rāja. The details of the date, viz., Śaka 1457 (expressed by the chronogram sāmavēdyē), Manmatha, Uttarāyaṇa, śu. 5, Pūraṭṭādi, Wednesday correspond regularly to A.D. 1535, December 29, Wednesday. ·11; ·34.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . sāmavedye śakasyābde somayājī kalerripuḥ . Upadāmupadamśāḍyām raṅgapo raṅgiṇe vyadhāt . svasti śrī . manmathasamvatsarattu Uttarāyaṇat pūrvapakṣattu pañcamiyum budhavāramum peṟṟa pūraṭṭāti nakṣatrattu nāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevatku tiruppaṇiceyvār kottu kāśyapagotrattu jaiminisūtrattu koyilppiḷḷai nālukavipperumāḷ cīy(ā)r bṛhaspatisarvayājiyār colaimalaipperumāḷ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷputran śrīraṅgarājansomayāji tirukalikaṉṟidāsan samarppitta muṉṉāḷ prākku jaya varuṣam puraṭṭātimāsam patinālānteyati mutaliṭṭa poṉ 3 10 7 U^2^ Aṟpacimāsam pattānteyati mutaliṭṭa U 8 Āka poṉ 3 1000 8 10 nāḷatu mutaliṭṭa poṉ 2 Āka poṉ 4 10 Intappoṉ nāṟpatukkum
Aśītibhāgo vṛddhissyāt Eṉkiṟapaṭiye Eṇpatukku Oru paṇa viḻukkāṭṭile vaṭṭik kuk kūṭṭiṉa māsam Oṉṟukku vaṭṭi � U Āka varuṣam Oṉṟukku māsam paṉṉiraṇṭukku vaṭṭikku kūṭṭiṉa poṉ 6 Intap poṉ Āṟukkum Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa cemattaḷikai pattukku taḷikai Oṉṟukku paṇam Iraṇṭu pori Amutu 4 100kku U 4 Āka vilaippaṭi 2 10 Atiracam paṭi nālukku Uru Irunūṟṟu nālukku vilaippaṭi poṉ 1 U 2 vaṭaippaṭi nālukku Uru Irunūṟṟu nālukku vilaippaṭi pu 8 10 cukiyaṉ paṭi nālukku Uru Irunūṟṟu nālukku vilaippaṭi U 6 Āka poṉ 5 10 pāṉakam kūṉ paṉṉiraṇṭukku vilaippaṭi U 6(1/2)10 paḻa Amutu teṅkāy Amutu vilai U (1/2)10 cantaṉam paṭi patiṉañcukku vilaippaṭi U 1(1/2)10 Aṭaikkāyamutu vilai U 1
Ilai Amutu vilai U (1/2)10 toppuc ciṟappiṟku parivaṭṭa vilai U (1/2) Āka poṉ 6 Intappoṉ Āṟum koṇṭu varuṣam toṟum vaṭatirukkāveri vaṭakaraippaṭukai kīḻ mukam tiruvaṭik kuṟai Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷajiyyar toppukku meṟku muvventirayar toppukku vaṭakku kāliṅkarāyar toppukku kiḻakku tirukkāverikku teṟku Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa Eṉṉutāṉa toppile varuṣam Orukkāl saṅgramam muṉṟānteyti pāṭiveṭṭaikku pettappa nāyakkar toppilum (p) piṟappaṭṭu Aruḷi tiruveṭṭai tirukkaṇcāttuvatukku muṉṉāka kirātar Aṇivakirumaḷavum perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu Amutu ceytaruḷiṉatil viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu pattil Oṉṟum tirumalai Irācāviṉ Irāmāṉucakūṭamāṉa Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷa jiyyar maṭattil Iṟṟai nāḷ saṅgramapuṇyakālattile samarppittapaṭiāle Ippaṭiye varuṣamtoṟum Ācandrārkkamāka tirunāka
paṭṭaṇam Eṉṉuṭaiya śiṣyan nākatevar kaṇakkappiḷḷai dharmmam Āka naṭakkakkaṭa vatākavum . śrīraṅgarājāyanamaḥ § Intac cilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikkuk koyil kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇa priyan Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 24.423 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
